# Frontier — Philippine Regulatory Atlas

## Wave 0: Regulatory Body Inventory

- [ ] **build-registry** — Enumerate every Philippine executive department, attached agency, GOCC, constitutional commission, independent body, and major statutory code. For each, assess citizen-facing compliance requirements and computability potential. Output: master registry + generated Wave 1 aspects.

## Wave 1: Source Scanning (generated by Wave 0)

_Wave 1 aspects will be populated after Wave 0 completes. Expected: 30-50+ aspects covering SSS, GSIS, PhilHealth, Pag-IBIG, BOC/Customs, DAR, BSP, ERC, CDA, CHED, DepEd, TESDA, PRC, LTO, LTFRB, MARINA, CAAP, DMW/POEA, OWWA, NTC, DOH, FDA, DHSUD, PAGCOR, NCIP, NPC, PCC, IPOPHL, BFAR, DENR/EMB, and more._

## Wave 2: Cross-Reference and Scoring (blocked by Wave 1)

- [ ] **deduplicate-and-merge** — Consolidate all domains from Wave 1 into clean master list, resolve overlaps within this loop AND with ph-compliance-moats-reverse's 41 domains
- [ ] **score-domains** — Score each domain on 4 dimensions (market/moat/computability/pain), compute weighted opportunity score
- [ ] **professional-fees-validation** — WebSearch for actual professional service pricing for top-scoring domains, validate moat depth

## Wave 3: Synthesis (blocked by Wave 2)

- [ ] **ranked-shortlist** — Produce final ranked shortlist with rationale, next-step recommendations for top 5 candidates, and unified atlas combining both surveys
